Primal Velium Battle Axe  
 

Lore Item No Trade Placeable
Slot: PRIMARY
Skill: 2H Slashing Atk Delay: 44
DMG: 45 Dmg Bonus: 152 AC: 17
This item is placeable in yards, guild yards, houses and guild halls.
STR: +8 DEX: +8 STA: +8 CHA: +8 WIS: +8 INT: +8 AGI: +8 HP: +75 MANA: +75 ENDUR: +75
SV FIRE: +8 SV DISEASE: +8 SV COLD: +8 SV MAGIC: +8 SV POISON: +8
Required level of 55.
Effect: Avatar (Combat, Casting Time: Instant)
WT: 2.5 Size: LARGE
Class: WAR PAL RNG SHD BER
Race: ALL
Slot 1, Type 4 (Weapon: General)
Slot 2, Type 20 (Ornamentation)
Primal Velium Battle Axe
Lore Item No Trade Placeable
Slot: PRIMARY
Skill: 2H Slashing Atk Delay: 44
DMG: 45 Dmg Bonus: 152 AC: 17
This item is placeable in yards, guild yards, houses and guild halls.
STR: +8 DEX: +8 STA: +8 CHA: +8 WIS: +8 INT: +8 AGI: +8 HP: +75 MANA: +75 ENDUR: +75
SV FIRE: +8 SV DISEASE: +8 SV COLD: +8 SV MAGIC: +8 SV POISON: +8
Required level of 55.
Effect: Avatar (Combat, Casting Time: Instant)
WT: 2.5 Size: LARGE
Class: WAR PAL RNG SHD BER
Race: ALL
Slot 1, Type 4 (Weapon: General)
Slot 2, Type 20 (Ornamentation)

Item Type:2H Slashing
Stackable:No
Lucy Entry By:Kerasota
Item Updated By:SwiftyMUSE
Source:Live
IC Last Updated:2021-12-25 10:19:48
Page Updated:Thu Oct 9th, 2008

Expansion: Scars of Velious
Rarity: Very Rare
Level to Attain: 55
[Drops | Comments ]

Drops

This item is found on creatures.

Kerafyrm's Lair (Sleeper's Tomb)
NPC Name
sleeper 1.0 - Hraashna the Warder
sleeper 1.0 - Nanzata the Warder
sleeper 1.0 - Ventani the Warder
The Progenitor
Tukaarak the Warder


Zone(s) Found In:


Zone Name
Kerafyrm's Lair (Sleeper's Tomb)


Uploaded November 27th, 2008

Drop Rate
QuoteReply
# Sep 23 2001 at 1:04 PM Rating: Decent
__DEL__1591756772388
14 posts
On Povar we killed all 3 wanders and 2 Primal Axes, 2 Primal Lances, Spells, Primal Brawl
Stick, Primal Staffs, 3 Pairs castor Gloves, 2 Primal Bows, So as you can see the stuff does DROP nicely.. And on the way down a couple Priceless Weapons dropped, 1 HSlashing, 1 Hand Blunt, and a Spear.. So was a nice night.. And FYI a Primal Axe rotted how sad.. But is Life..

# Sep 01 2001 at 12:13 PM Rating: Decent

8 posts

▲ Page top
Primal Velium Battle Axe
QuoteReply
# Jul 03 2001 at 9:09 AM Rating: Decent
__DEL__1591763328810
1 post
It exists, I got one last night, in Sleepers, Avatar is really cool, and lasts 6 minutes, awsome stats, procs alot, It's alot of fun to use, I let it proc then switched back to my warr FA, Just an awsome weapon, plain and simple.
▲ Page top
RE: Primal Velium Battle Axe
QuoteReply
# May 18 2002 at 6:26 PM Rating: Decent
__DEL__1592757218364
Scholar
34 posts
Interrestingly enough, I did the same thing with my Primal Velium BA, untill I started parsing my logs. I have a Shovel of the Harvest and that weapon can do crazy damage. I would get the Primal to proc and swap to my shovel. I decided just for giggles to see what my dps (damage per second) was and it's actually higher with the Primal Velium BA. This quite suprised me as the Shovel has a higher ratio than the Axe does. You would think it would do more damage? I need to parse the logs from a couple identical fights and just use the axe for them and then proc and swap and compare. So far tho all evidence points to Primal outdamaging my Shovel. Check your own logs you might be suprised to find that your Primal does more damage. However the Warrior Epic's proc might make up the diff. Would be interresting to see.
▲ Page top
Axe

#Anonymous, Posted: Jun 06 2001 at 1:44 AM, Rating: Sub-Default, (Expand Post) Geez you n00bs who post get on my nerves. All epics give 40% haste. CoF 36%, an FBSS only gives 21%....not 45 lol.
RE: ignorant n00bs who post..
QuoteReply
# Jun 21 2001 at 3:02 PM Rating: Default
Anonymous
View User Forum
Anonymous
Whoa, all Epics have 40% haste? Sweet! I didn't know that when my Druid Epic casted Wrath of Nature that I was not only dealing 1600 damage and slowing its walk speed down (21% or something in that are), I was also giving it haste! WOOT!
/sarcasm off
Shut up. I am sorry, but not all epics have Haste. You probably couldn't even name 2 epics. When you found a Rusty Short Sword on an orc pawn, you probably told all your friends,"Whoa, dewd, i got a L337 S\/\/()|2|) that would rox j00!". Sorry for that everyone, he just sounds like the kind of person who would type like a 'L337 Dewd'.

# Sep 08 2003 at 12:47 PM Rating: Decent
__DEL__1591773556005
35 posts
u sound like a jerk man... i hate people who post and it seems like the only thing in they're life is EQ... its so pathetic. i mean im into it and all... but im not gonna bash on someone for not knowing something as specific like haste on another classes epic... or even for someone not knowing the names of 2 epic weapons... so ***** off

#Anonymous, Posted: Jun 12 2001 at 10:08 AM, Rating: Sub-Default, (Expand Post) fbss is 17%, n00b

QuoteReply
# Jun 13 2001 at 8:34 PM Rating: Default
__DEL__1591750926490
95 posts
It depends on how you look at the numbers, 20/21% shows about what the delay is changed too, where as 17/18% shows the actual speed gain, or atleast something along those lines I believe.
▲ Page top
RE: ignorant n00bs who post..
QuoteReply
# Aug 14 2001 at 7:47 AM Rating: Default
__DEL__1592248837442
95 posts
ur right, there are two ways for haste to messure:

.) swing increase percentage
.) delay reduction percentage
▲ Page top
#Anonymous, Posted: Jun 10 2001 at 7:09 PM, Rating: Sub-Default, (Expand Post) Please, for the good of the children, shut up.
#Anonymous, Posted: Jun 11 2001 at 8:31 AM, Rating: Sub-Default, (Expand Post) whats with warriors?
RE: ignorant n00bs who post..
QuoteReply
# Jun 19 2002 at 6:23 PM Rating: Decent
__DEL__1591774066779
Scholar
103 posts
Ranger epic doesn't Proc haste BTW, it's worn haste, of 40 or 41%, depending on how you figure it. Monk Epic is clickable haste, Rogue and bard are the only "Proc'd" haste epics.

Wolveran Shadowbane
54th Pathfinder of the Non-shafted Ranger Race/diety
▲ Page top
#REDACTED, Posted: Mar 28 2003 at 12:48 AM, Rating: Sub-Default, (Expand Post) you are mistaken about the rogue.. all i know is the rogue epic is hast worn
RE: ignorant n00bs who post..
QuoteReply
# Jun 25 2002 at 8:01 AM Rating: Default
__DEL__1591770921746
53 posts
Rogue Epic haste is a constant proc, counts as a song type of haste. Stacks with other worn hastes RBG COF and the likes.
Enchanters have a Clickable SoS on thier epic so that they dont have to send haste to everyone and loose all that mana.
Bhindu
▲ Page top
RE: ignorant n00bs who post..

#Anonymous, Posted: May 24 2001 at 5:24 AM, Rating: Sub-Default, (Expand Post) this is the best 2hander in the game no questions dispuitable better than the epics but come on think about it you WONT EVER SEE IT
#Anonymous, Posted: May 24 2001 at 5:21 AM, Rating: Sub-Default, (Expand Post) ok heres the truth this weapon does exist and it is about the same as SK epic this is 33 35 sk epic is 40 45 you get the extra dmg cap being 40 10 higher delay but put some haste on it which you will have by this level since 5 sks on my server have Innouruk's Curse and the stats are about the same Innouruk's Curse a lil better, but slightly very very slightly POINT:EPIC-BEST, KILLING SLEEPER-BEST so i mean you choose epic is very slightly better if at all but thats the point these are two hardest places your never gonna get either prolly thats why they made sk epic so damn hard it freakin rules the pallys kind of got dissed on this but your epics pallys are easier than your evil breathrin's are so i give it up to this its fair that this drops cause if you get here and kill it thats like as hard if not harder than your epic ok thanks people
RE: ok
QuoteReply
# May 29 2001 at 9:39 PM Rating: Default
Anonymous
View User Forum
Anonymous
apparently you have no idea what is involved in the acquisition of the paladin epic . The paladin epic is not easier than the shadow knight epic I have gone through both and the hardest part in each is the fact that both have a drop or two that are extremely rare.
IF you think the paladin epic is short you need to start off the quest getting soulfire and work your way through it to begin with but until you know the entirety of a quest dontn pass judgement on its difficulty.

18 posts
This is like better than the SK epic weapon in terms of damage/delay ratio and maybe even stat adds. I think i would rather have this weapon over Sk epic. If i ever to get this (BIG UNLIKELY THERE) i will never ever give it up and all you non belevers will have to suck my *******

▲ Page top
RE: OH MY GOD!!!!!
QuoteReply
# May 29 2001 at 5:00 AM Rating: Decent
__DEL__1592756973036
Scholar
141 posts
You are correct, this is better than the SK epic - but this is only to be expected.. Epics aren't that difficult to attain now given the right groups and getting past the bottleneck mob of your particular class.

Whereas Sleepers Tomb is somewhere most people will never see unfortunately.

And as a side note to the people class xxxx with weapon yyyy would beat person zzzz with this item in a duel.. It would only need to proc Avatar once in that battle and boom.. instant swiss-cheesed duelist.

Quote:

Avatar = 100str, 100 dex, 100agl, 100 stam, 100 atk.
But the 100 str gives an addition 100 atk or so. SO you actually gain 200 atk off it.
